pages.title: Capturing willing screams
pages.text: Souls enter jars when $(rev)eligible scythe kills$(warn) convert pity into inventory clutter. Stockpile jars — altars demand one beside blood.$(br2)Soul jars also participate in crafting soul hearts at the sewing grid.

pages.title: Soul in a Jar
pages.text: Catalyst slot opposite blood on the altar. Without both jars the altar sulks.
